race.comment: Keen to side with the unexposed CHAINS OF LOVE (13) who comes down from Sydney off a highway win, carrying 59kg there and coming away to win well in solid time. She's bred to keep improving and gets a nice run on speed here against a few that have taken their turns against each other. WISE INLAW (2) put up a strong rating winning here two back when given a sweet ride, solid again last time when just edged out by BARARI (12) who has put up three victories in a row. There won't be much between them again. AFTERBERNA (11) backs up from a solid win last week and will be rock hard fit up on speed. BLANKFIELD (6) did beat AFTERBERNA at the midweeks last time so must have claims providing he can continue to progress.
